## SpaceX (SPCX) falls in premarket after Starship test flight is aborted

An aborted Starship test directly impairs SpaceX's launch schedule and near-term commercial prospects; for a recently-IPO'd name, repeated operational setbacks risk compressing the valuation premium baked in at issuance.

- Starship test flight was aborted, triggering a premarket selloff in SPCX.
- The aborted flight is operationally material — Starship is central to SpaceX's launch cadence and commercial pipeline.
- Single outlet (CNBC) coverage; no specific decline magnitude is given in the headline.
- Adds to a cluster of same-day negative SPCX headlines across multiple outlets.
